response.justification: Bogdan has relevant experience in software development and some exposure to AI and fintech, but lacks direct experience in agentic AI architecture and senior technical leadership at scale.
strengths: Experience with multiple programming languages and technologies
concerns: Lack of direct experience in agentic AI architecture
Not enough experience in senior technical leadership roles
Limited experience in regulated or high-stakes commercial environments

key_factors.factor: Lack of direct agentic AI experience
